prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: DOY-ASRO-GEMSTONEKIT-3PC-BUN-MDG Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 5lb Rough Gemstone Mining Kit Geology Paydirt Classifier and ID Chart (Madagascar) Description: Each five pound ASR Outdoor Madagascar rough gemstone paydirt bag is a cornucopia of excitement and discovery, with at two pounds of gemstones. Packed with a great variety of authentic and genuine Brazilian gemstones, as well as smaller tumbled stones, the thrill of sifting through paydirt and identifying precious gemstones awaits!

HOW TO USE: Fill a large bucket with water; scoop out paydirt into sifting screen (scoop and sifting screen not included); dip sifting screen into water to remove dirt and repeat with remaining paydirt; sift through material a second time to ensure no rocks or gemstones were missed! Clean and dry found gemstones and rocks and store in included burlap drawstring bag for safekeeping

In your gemstone paydirt, you’ll discover an assortment of rough gemstones like Amazonite, Rough Amethyst, Carnelian, Citrine, Clear Quartz, Fuchsite, Labradorite, Pyrite, Moonstone, Rose Quartz, Sea Jasper, Smoky Quartz, Tiger Eye and more! Use the gemstone identification chart to identify which gemstones you uncovered!

Whether you're a seasoned gem enthusiast or a curious beginner, our gemstone paydirt delivers the thrill of sifting through rich, organic material to uncover genuine gemstones. Perfect for hobbyists, rock collectors, kids and families looking for a fun, hands on and screen free learning activity!

KIT INCLUDES: 5lb rough Madagascar gemstone paydirt bag, 8 x 12 burlap cinch bag for rock and gemstone storage, paydirt screening instructions card and a double sided gemstone identification chart and information card Search Terms: Geology gemstone dig kit fossils paleontology archeology mining science kits for kids age 5 to 8 crystals fools gold nature stones learning toys tools amethyst pyrite crystal outdoor gear family games kids birthday gift Features: - MADAGASCAR 5LB GEMSTONE PAYDIRT: Enjoy the thrill of sifting through paydirt and identifying precious gemstones! Each five pound bag is packed with a rich assortment of genuine rough Madagascar gemstones (two pounds worth), as well an assortment of tumbled stones, all waiting to be discovered - ROUGH GEMSTONE KIT INCLUDES: 5lb rough Madagascar gemstone paydirt bag, 8x12 burlap cinch bag for gemstone storage, paydirt screening instructions card and double sided gemstone identification chart and information card; kit includes sifting screen - ROCKS AND GEMSTONES: In your paydirt, you’ll discover an assortment of rough gemstones like Amazonite, Rough Amethyst, Carnelian, Citrine, Clear Quartz, Fuchsite, Labradorite, Pyrite, Moonstone, Rose Quartz, Sea Jasper, Smoky Quartz, Tiger Eye and more - PLASTIC SAND SIFTER: The kit comes with a 9.75” x 9.75” classifying sieve ideal for sifting through your gemstones and paydirt. The sieve has 36 holes per square inch, comes with convenient handles, and is made of durable plastic ideal for use in any weather - IDENTIFICATION CHART: Included is a gemstone identification chart so you can easily identify the gems from your rough mix bags, and the chart is laminated so you can take it with you to identify precious gems out in the field === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
